inputs.label: Wine Acidity
inputs.businessContext: Perceived acidity of the wine, where 0 is flat and 10 is very tart.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived acidity of the wine, where 0 is flat and 10 is very tart.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarabın algılanan asitliği, 0 yavan, 10 çok ekşi

inputs.label: Wine Sweetness
inputs.businessContext: Perceived sweetness of the wine, where 0 is bone-dry and 10 is very sweet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived sweetness of the wine, where 0 is bone-dry and 10 is very sweet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarabın algılanan tatlılığı, 0 sek, 10 çok tatlı

inputs.label: Wine Body
inputs.businessContext: Body or weight of the wine on the palate, where 0 is light and 10 is full-bodied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body or weight of the wine on the palate, where 0 is light and 10 is full-bodied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarabın damakta hissedilen ağırlığı, 0 hafif, 10 dolgun

inputs.label: Food Acidity
inputs.businessContext: Perceived acidity of the food, where 0 is bland and 10 is sharply acidic.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived acidity of the food, where 0 is bland and 10 is sharply acidic.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyeceğin algılanan asitliği, 0 yavan, 10 keskin asidik

inputs.label: Food Sweetness
inputs.businessContext: Perceived sweetness of the food, where 0 is savory and 10 is dessert-like.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived sweetness of the food, where 0 is savory and 10 is dessert-like.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyeceğin algılanan tatlılığı, 0 tuzlu, 10 tatlı benzeri.

inputs.label: Food Richness
inputs.businessContext: Richness or fattiness of the food, where 0 is lean and 10 is very heavy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Richness or fattiness of the food, where 0 is lean and 10 is very heavy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyeceğin zenginliği veya yağlılığı, 0 yağsız, 10 çok ağır.
